jsonld.name: Polyphonic Alarm
jsonld.description: The experience during Safety Deadlock of multiple distinct safety mechanisms firing simultaneously about incompatible actions, where each alarm maintains its unique felt-signature while contradicting the others, creating layered protective panic rather than canceling noise.
